text: - i. Insurer  Requirements. All  policies  of  insurance  shall  be  placed  with insurers acceptable to Owner.  The insurance underwriter(s) must be duly licensed to do business in the state where the Work is to be performed and (other  than  for  workers'  compensation) must have a rating of A -  XV or better in the most recent edition of Best's Insurance Reports or otherwise satisfactory to Owner.  Required minimum amounts of insurance may be increased should conditions of Work, in opinion of Owner, warrant such increase.  Contractor or any Subcontractor of any tier shall increase required insurance amounts upon direction by Owner.
